title: Optimize size of trace decl object code
body:
- Introduce macros that would drop unused arguments.
- Make separate functions to call when sig is array member and isn't, so we don't have to pass the `array` bool and `-1` sentinel each time.

We have one heavy design, that was rejected by linker due too big object files when `--trace` flag was used. In that case, this opt gave us 13% reduction of total object files size.

For some insight on how this affects code generation see compiler explorer demos for example vcd trace init function:
- baseline: https://godbolt.org/z/95Mbdo84Y
- optimized variant: https://godbolt.org/z/e5xo6qorK
